reply_original:
Hi there! I'm sorry for the misunderstanding. Actually, we have a huge variety of female characters too! You can find them by exploring the homepage or using the "Filter" function to browse different categories.

If you're having trouble finding them or have specific suggestions, please email us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh:
你好！很抱歉造成了误解。实际上，我们也有非常丰富的女性角色！你可以通过浏览首页或使用“筛选”功能来查看不同的类别。

如果你在查找过程中遇到困难，或者有具体的建议，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。
